data.title: SC9 gate: integrate ≥100 prevention threshold into epic-closure completion-verifier check
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Modify test `test_epic_closure_sc_report` (or create new modify-existing-test task) in `tests/scripts/test-epic-closure-sc-report.sh` to assert that the completion-verifier invokes preconditions-coverage-harness.sh and fails when preventions_count < 100.

Given: completion-verifier running epic-closure for epic 736d-b957
When: preconditions-coverage-harness.sh returns preventions_count=50 (< threshold)
Then: completion-verifier marks SC9 as FAIL and includes that in its report

## Implementation Notes
Modify `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md` to add the SC9 check in its epic-closure procedure:

In "Step 2: Load Implementation Evidence" for epic-level verification, add:
- When verifying SC9 ("Coverage: dry-run harness demonstrates prevention of ≥100/818 bugs"):
  1. Locate `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh` — if absent, classify SC9 as FAIL (harness not yet implemented)
  2. Run: `bash <REPO_ROOT>/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh --corpus=<REPO_ROOT>/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json --dry-run`
  3. Parse COVERAGE_RESULT from output
  4. If preventions_count >= 100: mark SC9 PASS with evidence: "preventions_count=N (≥100 threshold)"
  5. If preventions_count < 100: mark SC9 FAIL with evidence: "preventions_count=N (< 100 threshold)"
  6. SC9 verdict is non-negotiable — if harness exits non-zero, also mark FAIL

This is an UPDATE to an LLM instruction file. Test verifies structural boundary: the completion-verifier mentions SC9 check procedure, references the harness path, and documents threshold.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] completion-verifier.md references preconditions-coverage-harness.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'preconditions-coverage-harness' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] completion-verifier.md documents 100 prevention threshold for SC9
  Verify: grep -q 'preventions_count.*100\|100.*threshold\|≥100' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] .test-index updated for completion-verifier.md with test for SC9 gate
  Verify: grep -q 'completion-verifier.md.*test-epic-closure-sc-report\|test-epic-closure-sc-report.*completion-verifier' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index || grep -q 'completion-verifier' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Structural test exists for SC9 gate in completion-verifier
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-epic-closure-sc-report.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
